purpose: Category definitions for the governed HAL knowledge/memory registry. Categories describe the kind of durable operational knowledge a memory holds, not permissions or guardrail bypass rules.

project_architecture.description: Stable repo and service architecture facts (modules, boundaries, read-only posture).

hal_runtime_lanes.description: Local model lane URLs, profile aliases, and routing roles. Runtime health must still be checked live.

known_workflows.description: Approved operator workflows and review steps (read-only, local-first).

safety_policy.description: Non-negotiable safety boundaries (no submit/send/fax/upload/Gateway, no raw CSV, no A/R inference).

insurance_narratives.description: Insurance narrative workflow boundaries (local-only, review-required, not_submitted).

softdent_exports.description: SoftDent export-file mode boundaries and missing-data rules.

quickbooks_readonly.description: QuickBooks read-only summary boundary; no write path.

known_bugs_and_fixes.description: Historical incidents, root causes, and verified fixes. Historical unless re-verified.

operator_playbooks.description: Step-by-step operator playbooks for common tasks.

deployment_notes.description: Deployment and environment notes. May become stale; runtime config wins.

test_results.description: Summarized test/eval outcomes with date and environment. Not current health.

future_tasks.description: Backlog items and planned work. Never proof of implemented behavior.

tax_accounting.description: Federal and Kansas S corporation tax guidance for the practice entity: 1120-S, K-1, reasonable compensation, Kansas K-120S, PTE tax, and owner estimated taxes. Guidance only — CPA review required before filing.
